rationale: Educ. Code §43.017 governs the State Board of Education's use of commercial banks to collect permanent school fund investment income. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The State Board of Education may contract with one or more commercial banks to receive payments of dividends and interest on securities in which the state permanent school funds are invested
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns bank-agent contracts for permanent school fund collections, not property tax homestead exemptions.
